response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed-systems and backend expertise, with notable experience at Stripe and Shopify, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of fintech domain depth, production multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments, or direct experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ engineers. His fintech-relevant roles (Stripe, Shopify) are recent and may not cover the full spectrum required.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise demonstrated at Stripe and Shopify, including event-driven architectures and high-scale systems.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows.
Proven leadership in engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD) and team scaling, with roles at Shopify and Stripe.
concerns: No explicit mention of fintech-specific systems (e.g., real-time credit risk, working-capital management) or compliance/regulatory experience in regulated environments.
Limited evidence of architecting or operating production multi-agent AI systems in commercial, high-stakes contexts.
No direct experience with hybrid engineering models or governance frameworks for outsourced engineering teams.
